step_rationale: K255 propionylation mediates BCAA-facilitated platelet activation.
mechanism: Tropomodulin-3 propionylation at lysine 255 couples branched-chain amino acid metabolism to platelet activation signaling.

references.title: Branched-Chain Amino Acid Catabolism Promotes Thrombosis Risk by Enhancing Tropomodulin-3 Propionylation in Platelets.
